New Request Details Step 1 of 5
Your progress stays here while this page is open
The simplest process ever

You name the price.
They show up. That’s it.

A few steps. Even less hassle.

★The bit nobody else does
1

You set the price.

Tell us the type of service you need — and, more importantly, how much you want to pay. Getting that established right up front saves you time and money.

2

They show up.

Vetted local workers raise their hand, you make your selection, and your job gets done.

3

That’s it!

We transfer your payment to the worker securely and instantly. You rate your worker — and can even add them as a favorite for future jobs. Done!

I’m ready to GO →
The things others won't

Yes, we can Gopher that too.

Other apps stop at the easy stuff. Gopher Request keeps going — because a real neighbor would.

Age-restricted

Beer, wine, and the occasional vape pen.

Your Gopher is a real, verified adult. They check ID. We’ll deliver what most apps quietly refuse to.

Same-day, often same-hour

That thing you needed an hour ago.

Forgotten cord. Last-minute gift. Pickup the courier said couldn’t happen until Tuesday. Post the request — someone’s usually rolling within minutes.

Odd-job-friendly

The one nobody else has a category for.

Move a piano three blocks. Stand in a return line. Drop a casserole at your mom’s. If a neighbor could do it, a Gopher will.

You name the price

The number you’d actually pay.

No surge. No service fee theater. You offer what feels fair — and a Gopher in your neighborhood says yes, or doesn’t.

Don’t see your task? Describe it in the app. Odds are, a Gopher down the street already does it.

Side by side

How we stack up.

A short, honest comparison with the gig apps you already know — the ones with the suitcase logos and the surge pricing.

 
The usual gig app
Your pickGopher Request
Who sets the price
✕ Their algorithm. Surge when it suits them.
✓ You do. Period.
Service & booking fees
✕ Stacked at checkout. Between 20–50%.
✓ What you offer is what they earn.Fees less than 10%.
Age-restricted pickups
✕ “Sorry, we can’t deliver that.”Ouch.
✓ Always available. Always safeguarded.
Who shows up
✕ A stranger from 40 miles away.
✓ A vetted neighbor — often someone you’d recognize.
Unique requests
✕ Doesn’t seem to fit. Can’t help.
✓ Describe it. With a fair offer, we’ll find you a neighbor.
Worker ownershipWhen something comes up mid-job
✕ Small snag? “Oh… you’ll need to call the platform.”
✓ Your worker owns the job — start to finish to happy.

Comparisons reflect typical fee structures and service limits across major gig-economy delivery and task apps in 2026.

See what your neighbors are saying

Real Stories From
Real Gopher Users.

From quick errands to big jobs, our community keeps coming back.

S

Sally Panepento

March 28, 2022

Recommends

Bad weather? No Problem! Gopher is the best! Our sales team was in the office on a rainy day and not one of us wanted to brave the weather to grab lunch. What to do? Call Gopher! We had lunch delivered by a Gopher in under 30 minutes! Fast and friendly! Highly recommend this service.

K

Karen Kreeger

2 years ago

★★★★★

Super easy. I needed some groceries to make dinner but didn't have time to go to the store. I ordered my groceries online and my gopher delivered them at the exact time I requested!

E

Elissa Moss

Ellington Place

Recommends

YardU recently became a vendor on the Gopher Go marketplace. It was incredibly easy to sign up.

S

Sonny Bowser

December 9, 2018

Recommends

Just had 1st Gopher request. Wife needed butter quickly to cook tonight. Weather sucks but had it at my front door 20min after request. Awesome. Just plain Awesome. Thanks Gopher.

S

scott jacob

a month ago

★★★★★

Great first time experience using Gopher! I needed a couch disposed of and remembered hearing about Gopher on a social media site. I downloaded the app and received offers almost immediately.

T

Troy Weeks

Ocean Isle Beach Island

Recommends

I'm really happy to see the growth of the Gopher community in and around the Triangle. I love the convenience of getting what I want when I want it when I might not have the time to do it myself. I've used Gopher for hauling away junk, basic errands, meal delivery, and even ride share.

A

Antoine Latimore

2 years ago

★★★★★

Decided to try Gopher out today on the ride share and it was my first one and it went very well had the pleasure of Picking up some very cool ladies that made it go smooth. Thank you

M

Melissa Staton

November 11, 2024

Recommends

I just started using Gopher as a means to earn extra income & so far-I love it! You should try it out the next time you need an errand ran for you, food/groceries delivered, or a handyman.

W

Wrenn Smith

a year ago

★★★★★

I used Gopher to get a handyman to come and fix an issue with my dryer at a condo I manage in Myrtle Beach. No having to search google for hours or check reviews and call for availability. The app instantly gave me bids.

N

Nick Jordan

Glenwood South

Recommends

Gopher is awesome, they can help with literally anything. I use them for grocery shopping and food delivery at any time of day.

A

Alpa Patel

October 18, 2020

Recommends

Using Gopher for food delivery is great. It is super fast and costs me way less than the other guys. The Gopher apps are must if you're in Columbia, SC.

C

Corey White

West La Mesa/College Area

Recommends

I just completed my first job on Gopher and boy was that easy money! I don't know why more folks aren't on this yet, but until they are, I'm happy to take requests directly!

E

Emily Folk

August 18, 2023

Recommends

Great for a college move-in! We used Gopher for the first time earlier this week to help with moving our daughter into her college dorm. Our gopher, Alex, was a great help! He was friendly and efficient. Our unloading time was probably nearly cut in half with his help. I highly recommend getting a gopher to help with a move-in!

B

Brandon P

3 years ago

★★★★★

Awesome app that provides what the RDU area has been missing - request anything from cigarettes, food delivery, a ride, or someone to come rake your lawn, all within the same app! Super quick customer service as well.

N

Nesrine Boukabara

University Park

Recommends

I love this app, it's so easy to use, you can make extra money easily, it's so different than other gigs apps. You can find almost anything from deliveries to ride share to handy man to yard work... the list is long. I'm so glad I found it

R

Rebecca Kimelman Elgart

November 25, 2018

Recommends

We tried Gopher for the first time today - it was amazing! We asked for someone to take care of our leaves and within a minute a Gopher accepted the request! He cleared our whole yard, was very friendly and we will definitely be using the Gopher app again soon!!

H

Heidi DelReal

5 years ago

★★★★★

I'm a busy mom of 4 kids and use Gopher to help me with everything from grocery pickup and food delivery to lawn maintenance. It's easy to use and a great value and time-saver. I highly recommend using this app!

Made services so easy. I had a big job and bid it out. Will definitely use again.

Great experience with Gopher help moving some furniture! Will use them again for sure

Beer, ice and snacks delivered right to my door so we could safely celebrate the fourth. You can't beat that kind of convenience!

If u want a job well done download Gopher request!!

★★★★★

I was missing some cords needed for a trade show display and the show was opening in a couple of hours. Gopher came through in a pinch and delivered the cords directly to the convention center. Excellent app and excellent service

The convenience of the gopher service is fantastic. Give it a try

Recommends

Gopher is AWESOME! We needed help packing and cleaning for a move. And we needed it in a hurry! We got great folks QUICKLY. I love that the app lets you see their ratings and how many jobs they've done so you know that you get reliable, trustworthy people!

The only platform that has your back.
…and your Worker’s!

—trust that runs both ways

Every other gig app checks the worker for your safety. We do that too. But we’re the first gig marketplace ever to provide assurance for the workers. With TrustShield™ you can verify yourself, so the worker showing up at your door has real assurance too. Trust shouldn’t only protect one side of the handshake.

It’s free, it’s optional, and verified requesters can even earn savings on certain requests - because a little assurance makes the whole marketplace move faster.

Learn about TrustShield™
Verify once. Carry your TrustShield™ badge across every request you make.

Learn about Gopher’s commitment to Trust and Safety on our worker portal too.

Connecting customers, businesses, merchants, and local workers with fair-priced services.

Need it now? Gopher it!

Suggested offer assistance

Based on thousands of similar requests in your area.

Low Fair Generous
$10 $20
Suggested Offer
$
Drag the slider either direction to find the offer that works for you
⚠️

All worker slots are filled

You've already approved the number of workers this request needs. To hire someone else, remove a hired Gopher first to free up a slot.

🚀

Your worker is ready!

Your full crew is hired. Tap Start Job when you're ready to get going.

🗑️

Cancel this request?

This will cancel the request and notify any interested workers. Don't worry — a cancelled request isn't gone for good. You can always find it later under Previous Requests.

⚡

Send to MY Gophers first?

Pick the trusted Gophers you'd like to get first crack at this request. Choose all, some, or none — then we'll prefill the rest for a quick review.

📸

Add a profile photo to continue

Gopher Request connects real neighbors with real local workers. A clear profile photo keeps everyone safe and accountable, so we ask every Request member to add one. It only takes a second.

👤
JPG or PNG. A clear headshot works best.

This looks age-restricted

Your request mentions "this item", which is commonly an age-restricted item. To keep everyone compliant with legal and safe-guarding protocols, please confirm whether this is an age-restricted request before continuing.

Submitting an age-restricted request without a valid ID at completion means the worker cannot release the items. The order may be canceled, you may still be charged worker time/fees, and repeat issues can lead to account review.

A quick note on your offer

You're always free to offer whatever you'd like, neighbor — but this one's on the lower end of what Gopher iQ suggests.

Gopher isn't an auto-fulfillment service. Every request is accepted by a real neighbor who chooses to take it, based on whether the offer feels fair to them. Other platforms can back their workers into jobs where they actually lose money — we're committed to never letting that happen. The work gets done by mutual agreement, and that's what keeps it fair for everyone.

Offers at this level can be accepted, and sometimes are — but more often they aren't. You're welcome to send it as-is, or adjust it to help it get picked up sooner.

Gopher Deals

Coming soon to your area

Local Gopher Deals are on their way to your neighborhood. Check back soon to discover offers from nearby businesses and neighbors.

Learn more

Gopher TrustShield™

Trust that runs both ways. Verify your identity once — and Gopher's badge follows you everywhere on the platform.

$
$1 off Age-Restricted Delivery and Ride-Sharing Applied automatically once you're verified. Adds up fast.
⚡
Skip ID re-entry Workers see your verification badge — no more re-showing ID on every job.
🛡
Verified neighbors only You earn assurance from verified workers, and they earn the same from you.
Verify in the Gopher Request app TrustShield verification is only available in the Gopher Request mobile app — it can't be completed here on the web. Our identity partner, iDenfy, captures a quick live selfie to confirm it's really you.
See the full TrustShield page →

Submit Identification

Verify your identity for this age-restricted order. You'll still show a physical ID in person at hand-off.

1 · Front of ID
2 · Selfie
📷
Checking your camera…
Front of your ID
Take a photo of the front of a valid government ID, or upload one.
ID front captured
Looks good? Continue to the selfie.
Quick selfie
Take a live selfie so we can match it to your ID. A live photo is required — upload isn't available for the selfie.
Selfie captured
Ready to submit.
Submitting here is pre-clearance only. A valid physical ID is still required in person before the order is handed over.
Camera
Position yourself in the frame, then capture.
📱
Finish in the app
Verifying an age-restricted order needs a live selfie, and we couldn't find a camera on this device. Please finish in the Gopher Request mobile app — it only takes a minute, and every phone has a camera built in.
✅
Identification submitted
You're pre-cleared for this order. Remember to bring your physical ID to the hand-off.

Online · here to help
Hi! I can answer questions about Gopher Request — billing, requests, workers, your account, anything. Ask me anything, or pick a starter below.

Send us feedback

Tell us what's working, what isn't, or what you'd like to see. We read every message.

Thanks — we got it.

Your note has been sent to the Gopher product team. If you asked us a question, we'll follow up by email within one business day.

TrustShield Verified — ID on file, no submission needed Safe-Guarding & Identity Verification Activated.

This is an age-restricted order. You must be at least 21 with a valid government-issued ID. A quick two-step check — a photo of your ID, then a selfie — and you’re set.

We’ll save this as your TrustShield so you won’t need to submit it again.

Enter your code
